candidates.why: Only substantive revenue-like line among candidates; represents insurance service revenue, which is part of total income. Prefer this over a pure balancing item as top-line proxy.
Explicit balancing item tied to revenue; used as fallback if Insurance revenue is missing for some years.

variables.notes: Banking interest and fee income totals are not available in candidate list; using insurance revenue and a balancing item as approximations for REVT may be imperfect.
No COGS/cost of sales related rows provided in candidate list; treating as missing/zero for PROF purposes.

candidates.why: This is net operating income, not an overhead expense; should NOT be used for SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Operating expenses on properties and premises
candidates.why: Clearly an operating overhead expense (property-related) that fits SG&A definition.
Primary personnel-related operating expense; canonical SG&A component for a bank.
Liability related to employee bonuses; economically part of personnel/SG&A costs though reported on balance sheet.

final_choice.row_label: Operating expenses on properties and premises

variables.notes: Excluded 'Net other operating income' because it is an income line, not SG&A. Selected main personnel and property operating expenses as SG&A components, plus the employee bonus liability as related overhead.

candidates.why: Impairment of capitalised development costs; may include R&D-type spending but is non-recurring/impairment in nature.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Explicit amortization of capitalized R&D; best available proxy for R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset; not a P&L expense, so not directly XRD but related context.
Accumulated amortization/impairment; balance sheet, not current-period expense line.
Balancing line; not an explicit R&D expense.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

variables.notes: Primary R&D proxy is the amortization of capitalized R&D. Included impairment of capitalised systems development as secondary R&D-related expense if amortization is missing in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest on amounts due from credit institutions
candidates.why: Interest income, not expense; excluded from XINT which should capture interest expense.
Interest income from loans; not an expense line, so excluded for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest on impaired loans and guarantees
candidates.why: Likely interest income on impaired exposures; not an expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest on commercial paper and bonds at fair value
candidates.why: Could be income or expense; context suggests part of interest income grouping, so not a pure expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest on commercial paper and bonds, held to maturity
candidates.why: Likely interest income on held-to-maturity assets; not expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest on amounts due to credit institutions
candidates.why: Clear funding cost; a component of interest expense and suitable proxy for XINT if broader totals are unavailable.
Major component of interest expense for a bank (customer deposit funding costs).
Key component of interest expense (bond funding costs); best single proxy for interest expense among candidates.
Interest expense on subordinated debt; another component of interest expense.
Income category; not an expense line, so excluded.
Residual/other interest expense; appropriate as lower-priority proxy.

candidates.row_label: Other Interest expense positive and net
candidates.why: Label suggests a net interest expense line, but appears unused (nan) in preview; ambiguous.
Earnings allocation, unrelated to interest; excluded.
Earnings attributable to minorities; not interest.
Very generic and unused; unclear if income or expense.
Label suggests interest payable, but with no data; ambiguous aggregate vs component.
Miscellaneous interest income; not expense.
Equity item; not interest expense.
Equity item; not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest on amounts due to credit institutions

variables.notes: A single total interest expense line is not available in the candidates, so XINT is represented as a priority list of major interest expense components. Later processing should treat these as alternatives, not summed values.

candidates.row_label: Profit from investments accounted for by the equity method
candidates.why: Income statement line, not an equity stock; excluded.
OCI or valuation item; not the total book equity balance.
Dividend income; not equity.

candidates.row_label: Investments accounted for by the equity method
candidates.why: Asset (equity-method investments), not shareholders' equity.
Component of equity but not the total; less appropriate than total equity lines.
Subcomponent of Other equity; not total equity.
Total equity attributable to owners of the parent (excludes non-controlling interests); best representation of book equity for PROF.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; slightly broader than desired for BE since MIB is modeled separately.

variables.notes: Primary choice is parent-level Total Equity. Consolidated Total equity including non-controlling interests is provided as fallback.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit; reflects flow to minorities, not the balance-sheet minority interest stock.
Appears to be the income statement amount attributable to minorities; again a flow, not stock.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; best match for MIB (minority interest in equity).
Alternate label for the same balance sheet minority interest; good secondary choice.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet non-controlling interests as the minority interest stock (MIB), with the alternate label as fallback; income statement portions are flows and not used for BE/MIB stock.
